title: Schedule a daily 3am UTC cron job + document the UTC choice
prompt: Write an Oban config for `config/runtime.exs` that runs `MyApp.Workers.NightlyCleanup` every day at 3:00 AM UTC. Include a comment on the plugin config line explaining WHY UTC is chosen: to avoid requiring the `tz` (or `tzdata`) dependency that Oban would need for any non-UTC timezone. Also configure a single `:maintenance` queue at concurrency 2. Write to `config/runtime.exs`.
tier_rationale: Requires actively avoiding the timezone trap and documenting the choice — two decisions rather than one.
research_citation: Oban.Plugins.Cron HexDocs — ':timezone — to use a timezone other than the default of Etc/UTC you must have a timezone database like tz installed and configured.'
